code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(l)
    string.trim(l)
  when None
    ""
  end

  let len = string.len(line)
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < len
    let b_opt = string.byte_at(line, i)
    match b_opt
    when Some(b)
      sum = sum + (b - 48)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  println("digit_sum=#{sum}")
  Ok(())
end
